response.overview: # Translation  Nuha, an ambitious actress, falls in love with a prominent director, Adam, who subsequently controls her life. Adam orchestrates and monitors her every move. Will she be able to free herself? Adam, a drama director, recognizes Nuha on set during filming. Adam sees characteristics in Nuha that match his preferences. Someone who is easily molded, controlled, and obedient. Adam begins to seduce Nuha. Adam successfully persuades and convinces Nuha to abandon her dream of becoming an actress. He highlights all his good qualities to Nuha until he finally manages to pressure her into marrying him quickly, despite their acquaintance being too short. After marriage, Nuha begins to discover Adam's true character. Nuha realizes that she is trapped like in a prison within her own household. Nuha returns all the money and gifts given by Adam as compensation for divorce as requested by Sarah, Adam's mother.
response.title: Aku Tanpa Cintamu
